text: The Hebrew text here is ambiguous, and may mean that the seraphim veiled their own faces and their own feet (cf. Ez. 1.11), but the sense given above is that of the Latin version.
‘I must needs keep silence’; in the Hebrew text, ‘I am lost!’; cf. Ex. 33.20.

The effect of prophecy or preaching, if it is met by an impenitent attitude, is to put the hearer in a worse frame of mind than ever, since the message has become staled by repetition. Cf. Mt. 13.14; where, however, our Lord quotes the prophecy in a milder form.
‘It is but empty show’; in the Hebrew text, ‘it will once again be destroyed’.
